tender.description: Installation of 13 sets of IGBT based Composite Converter with Traction Converter and Hotel Load Converter, Auxiliary Converter and VCU in existing Non-HOG WAP5 locomotives at Baroda and Commissioning Support and additional work as mentioned in NIT
